product_brief: Design Work Intelligence Kanban, a local-first workspace that connects information intake with project execution. The user follows selected work topics, receives relevant signals, captures ideas, decides what to do, delegates or executes work, tracks status, and turns useful inputs into concrete outputs.
topic_families: WeaveMark and prompt languages; local-first AI tools; agentic workflows; research automation; UI/UX examples; personal project opportunities; selected competitors and communities.
